env.name: APP_BASE_URL
env.description: Public HTTPS base URL of the deployed RealityCheck Live app. Required for Vapi tool calls.

env.name: VAPI_API_KEY
env.description: Vapi API key for assistant setup and voice workflows.

env.name: VAPI_ASSISTANT_ID
env.description: Existing Vapi assistant ID, if the assistant is already created.

env.name: TINYFISH_API_KEY
env.description: TinyFish API key for live Search and Fetch evidence collection.

env.name: REDIS_URL
env.description: Redis connection URL for run state, event timeline, evidence, cache, and final atlas.

env.name: OPENAI_API_KEY
env.description: OpenAI API key for market atlas synthesis. Use one of OPENAI_API_KEY, GROQ_API_KEY, or KIMI_API_KEY.

env.name: GROQ_API_KEY
env.description: Groq API key for fallback LLM synthesis.

env.name: KIMI_API_KEY
env.description: Kimi/Moonshot API key for fallback LLM synthesis.

env.name: DEMO_MODE
env.description: Set to true for fixture-backed runs without external services.

env.name: DEMO_SEEDED_RUN_ID
env.description: Seeded demo run ID. Defaults to run_demo_001.
